feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Export Vendor returns
entry.content:
Our plant is assigned to two sales areas

  1. VNS1/10/00 - Domestic Sales
  2. VNS1/20/00 - Export Sales

The sales area maintained in the SPRO “Define Shipping data for Plant” is VNS1/10/00 (only one sales area can be maintained at a time here and it is a TR config)

Now when there is a vendor returns performed for Domestic Vendors, the system is trying to fetch the “shipping conditions” from the Sales area VNS1/10/00 in the BP master and everything is working fine.

Now when there is a vendor returns performed for Export Vendors, the system is again trying to fetch the “shipping conditions” from the Sales area VNS1/10/00 and it fails because the Export BP is extended only to VNS1/20/00. Thus we are unable to perform any export returns.

Have you come across such scenarios in your projects? If yes, how can we resolve this?

entry.title: value of MCHB-CLABS always returns as 0 in AMDP SQLScript
entry.content:
Below is the AMDP query, I dont know why for all 3 approaches I am getting clabs, clabs2, clabs3 value as 0.000 or 0 but never actual value. It does return a value in ABAP SQL. What am I doing wrong?

lt_mchb_base = SELECT

mchb.matnr,

mchb.charg,

mchb.clabs,

mchb.mandt,

mchb.ersda,

CAST(mchb.clabs AS DECIMAL(15, 3)) AS clabs2,

CAST(mchb.clabs AS DOUBLE ) AS clabs3,

mchb.werks,

mchb.lgort

FROM mchb WHERE mandt = SESSION_CONTEXT('CLIENT');

entry.title: ODBC connection to SAP HANA HDI container fails with service key credentials
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support,

We are facing an issue when connecting from SQL Server to an SAP HANA HDI container using ODBC and a linked server.

Context:

  • Global Account A

  • SAP HANA version: 2025.28.17

  • Connection type: SQL Server linked server via ODBC

  • Target: SAP HANA HDI container

Observed behavior:

  • ODBC connection test is successful.

  • Direct connection to the SAP HANA instance using admin credentials works.

  • Connection using the credentials from the HDI container service key fails (authentication/connection error).

  • Same configuration works correctly in another Global Account B running SAP HANA version 2025.28.18, where HDI service key credentials allow a successful connection.

This suggests a difference in behavior or configuration between the two HANA versions or Global Accounts.

What we have verified:

  • Service key is correctly generated from the HDI container.

  • Credentials, host, port, and schema parameters are correctly mapped in the ODBC configuration.

  • Network and firewall settings are identical between both environments.

  • SQL Server and ODBC driver versions are the same.

Request:
Please help identify:

  • Whether there is a known issue or behavioral change in SAP HANA 2025.28.17 regarding external ODBC access to HDI containers.

  • Any required privileges, roles, or additional configuration needed to allow ODBC connections using HDI service key credentials.

  • Differences in HDI or security handling between versions 2025.28.17 and 2025.28.18.

We can provide:

  • Exact error messages returned by SQL Server / ODBC :  “Unable to initialize the data source object of OLE DB provider ‘MSDASQL’ for linked server ‘SAPHANAXXX’.
    The OLE DB provider ‘MSDASQL’ for linked server ‘SAPHANAXXX’ returned the message ‘[Microsoft][ODBC Driver Manager] SQLSetConnectAttr failed’.
    The OLE DB provider ‘MSDASQL’ for linked server ‘SAPHANAXXX’ returned the message ‘[SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB DLL][HDBODBC] General error;10 authentication failed: Detailed info for this error can be found with correlation ID ‘309CF299E44F1E42B45059181AC408FA’’.
    (.Net SqlClient Data Provider)”

Looking forward to your guidance.

Best regards,

entry.title: How do I maintain a warranty period for a material as basis for related equipment?
entry.content:
Dear Community-Colleagues,

here is the challenge:

To document our customer installed base, we will create customer equipment, of course with a link to the material sold. 

The issue:

How can I automate the maintenance of the warranty period in the equipment?

Let us assume we sort the start date.

But the warranty period is depending on the product and the market we are selling it to.

What solution would you propose? I was thinking about an info on material sales view level (MVKE), but did not find anything helpful.

Thanks for any kind of help,

Kay

entry.title: Tax determination in Third party sales order
entry.content:
In the determination of tax in third party sales order process I need to determine the departure country not from the supplying plant but from the country of the vendor. 

I tried creating a new condition table and access sequence having as key combination the vendor, destination country, customer and material tax classification but It does not work. How can I achieve this requirement?

Thanks

entry.title: Looking for Expert and Community Insights on My SAP Technical Journey
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I hope you are all doing well.

I would like to kindly ask for your feedback and professional insights regarding my current learning journey within the SAP Technical domain. My goal is to continuously improve my technical profile and ensure that my learning path aligns well with real-world SAP projects and current market expectations.

Below is a brief overview of my learning direction and the reasoning behind each focus area.


SAP Technical Learning Direction At this stage, my primary focus is on pursuing the SAP Technical track. I am currently concentrating on SAP Basis, aiming to build a strong and solid foundation in SAP system administration, core architecture, and operational concepts.
In parallel, I am expanding my knowledge across several complementary technical areas, as outlined below:


SAP HANA
My objective is to gain a clear and comprehensive understanding of SAP HANA database architecture and how SAP systems interact with the database layer in terms of structure, performance optimization, and system integration.


SAP ABAP
I am working on building a solid understanding of the ABAP stack, with a focus on how development processes are designed and implemented within SAP systems. This helps me better understand system logic, debugging, and collaboration with development teams from a technical perspective.


SAP CPI (Cloud Integration)
My focus includes understanding SAP’s transition from traditional on-premise environments to cloud-based platforms, along with cloud integration concepts such as internal (A2A) and external (B2B) integration scenarios.

Additionally, I have complemented this learning path with the Apache Camel Framework, due to its importance and relevance within SAP integration solutions.


SAP UI5 / Fiori & SAP BTP CAPM
Recently, SAP introduced important updates related to both frontend and backend development models. I have been exploring these updates and following commonly recommended learning resources to better understand the modern SAP development approach, including CAP-based application development.


Learning Approach
Overall, I am intentionally following a structured and methodical learning sequence to build a holistic understanding of SAP Architecture as an integrated enterprise platform, rather than focusing on individual tools or isolated technologies.


Current Learning Path & Courses
Below are the main courses I am currently following (via Udemy):

SAP NetWeaver Fundamentals

SAP Basis Administration

SAP HANA Administration

Apache Camel Framework with Spring Boot

SAP Cloud Integration (CI / CPI), including API Management and Event Mesh

SAP UI5 / Fiori Full Stack with TypeScript / JavaScript using SAP BTP RAPM / CAPM


I would truly appreciate your feedback on whether this learning path is well-structured and aligned with real-world SAP implementations, and whether there are any key areas you would recommend adding, adjusting, or prioritizing differently.

Thank you in advance for your time and valuable insights.

Best regards,

entry.title: Error: Failed to get transports for selected package during SAPUI5 ABAP deployment
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing this issue while deploying the application from SAP Web IDE to the ABAP repository.

entry.title: Replacing Allocation Structure in a Work Order
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to find a BAPI or a BADI to change the allocation structure inside a work order (IW32).

I am not able to create a new order type due to business restrictions and need to settle costs using a different allocation structure than the one assigned to the settlement profile.

Requesting help with creating an enhancement for the work order.

Thanks!

Tani

entry.title: Data category : Dimension vs Cube
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP HANA, in what cases the data category should be dimension and in what cases it should be cube ?

entry.title: Clarification on SLD Parameters for Managed System Setup (MSS) in FRUN 5.0 & S/4HANA on HANA
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

Greetings for the day,

We are planning to build an SAP S/4HANA system with SAP HANA DB 2.0 .

While preparing our documentation for the Managed System Setup (MSS) in Focused Run 5.0, we need clarification on which parameter values should be maintained for ABAP and HANA DB systems in a DEV/QAS environment without HA/DR.
We currently see two possible configurations:

Option A – For DEV/QAS without HA/DR
ABAP:sldsystemhome  = <virtual hostname of DB server>PERSON_NAME DB:
sldsystemhome  = <blank>
sldvirtdbhome  = <blank>

Option B – For DEV/QAS without HA/DR
ABAP:sldsystemhome = <virtual hostname of DB server>
HANA DB:sldsystemhome = <virtual hostname of DB server>
sldvirtdbhome = <SYSTEMDB service hostname>


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Performance - PPH_HANA_ACTIVE Table
entry.content:
Hello,

I found SAP notes 2122700 and 2332007, and I have some questions about table PPH_HANA_ACTIVE.

Has anyone else encountered this problem?
We use the BADI MRP_DISPATCHER_BADI, and after MRP-Live we use, change the date and at the end save it in our z-tables. In order to achieve the optimal processing time, we are considering making entries in the PPH_HANA_ACTIVE table.

Can entire packages that will be checked also be entered into the table? Or are only transactions and programs recommended? There is very little information on exactly how such an entry can affect performance.

entry.title: C_IEE2E vs. TS410: Is this the new standard for S/4HANA or a legacy "Business Suite" exam?
entry.content:
I am planning to specialize in SAP S/4HANA and am currently looking at the C_IEE2E certification (SAP Certified: Implementation Consultant - End-to-End Business Processes).

I am confused by the terminology and want to ensure I don't study for an outdated version:

  1. The description I received references "SAP Business Suite," which usually implies the legacy ECC environment.

  2. However, I see online that C_IEE2E is intended to replace the TS410 (Integrated Business Processes in S/4HANA) certification.

My Question: Has anyone taken the C_IEE2E recently? Is this strictly for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and is it now the preferred entry-level certification over the retiring TS410?

I want to ensure my certification path is aligned with the latest S/4HANA innovations, not legacy processes.

Thanks for the guidance!

entry.title: Guidance Needed – Repartitioning HANA Table /BIC/FZIM_C12
entry.content:
We would like your guidance regarding repartitioning one of our large tables in SAP CAR on PERSON_NAME. The table /BIC/FZ***  is currently split into 4 partitions, and we are seeing that partition ID 4 contains approximately 1.7 billion records and is rapidly approaching the 2 billion record limit in PERSON_NAME. Due to this, we are considering repartitioning the table, however we are not sure what the correct partitioning strategy should be.

At present, the table is partitioned using two layers: Round-Robin as the first layer and Range partitioning as the second layer based on the column KEY_*** (ranges 0,1,2). The data distribution appears to be highly skewed, with most records in partition 4 and significantly fewer in the other partitions (partition 1 being the smallest), so we are unsure whether the partitioning was originally done correctly and whether this strategy is appropriate for this table going forward.

We have reviewed SAP Notes such as DIGITS (BW-related) and DIGITS (general PERSON_NAME partitioning recommendations), and we are looking for a recommendation similar to the table-specific guidance mentioned in Question 27 of SAP Note DIGITS where the partition method and column are clearly defined for specific tables.

Could you please advise whether there are any table-specific recommendations for how /BIC/FZ***  should be partitioned, and what partition method and key column(s) would be best to avoid future growth issues?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Error while saving sales invoices - In comp.cd , the number range for 2026 has external numbers
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

I am currently stuck with an error while trying to create and save billing documents in our Production environment.

We have defined RV_BELEG no. rage internal within a certain range for Billing documents and RF_BELEG external for the accounting document, both in the same range.

However, we are getting error F5 153 "In comp.cd , the number range for 2026 has external numbers". We have perfectly set up the number ranges so I am getting crazy trying to understand why the system is showing this message.

What is even more weird is the fact that it only affects some users. However, there are no authorizations errors. Does anyone know what it could be?

Thankss

entry.title: What transaction code can I use to export a list of every material codes that in status Z1, Z2, Z3?
entry.content: I need to export the list of every material codes available in status Z1, Z2, Z3 on S4 HANA to perform data cleansing. The purpose is to find out which codes need to be obsoleted. What transaction code can I use to export a list of every material codes that in status Z1, Z2, Z3?

entry.title: Issue with SAP HANA Express Edition License on AWS Cloud
entry.content:
We have an SAP HANA Offering which SAP used to sell over AWS Marketplace as "SAP ON AWS". This is SAP Hana Express Edition. We know that now SAP does not sell it anymore on AWS-Cloud but we still have SAP instances running in our AWS Cloud in Production. The instances were working fine till today's morning the instances have started showing Invalid License error. 

Here the main point is we haven't purchased anything directly from SAP. The product is from AWS Marketplace. Can anyone help us on this issue? We need urgent support.

entry.title: SPL City field is blank
entry.content:
We moved from GTS 11.0 to HANA.  For SPL, we were thinking to screen the BP using city as well which hopefully will eliminate a lot of false blocks.  However, some of the SPLs the city field is blank, therefore not matching the city of the BP and does not hit even the name or address are hit.  Is there any way we can "ignore" the city when the field is empty?

Also, does stopword applies to City field as well?  Can we set a lower % under city field?

Thanks!

entry.title: Accout code which is posted by FAGL_FCV automatically
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to ask about Account code which is posted by FAGL_FCV automatically.

When I execute FAGL_FCV, SAP will automatically calculate valuation gain or loss and post using specific account code.

I want to change the specific account code which is automatically used by "Valuation area".

Do you know if it is possible?

entry.title: SAP BW Production Data Refresh
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to refresh the SAP BW data from the Production system into the SAP BW QA system. Our goal is to refresh only the data, ensuring that system settings and configurations in the QA system are not overwritten by those from the Production environment.

Could you please advise on the recommended approach or procedure to perform this activity?

Thank you.

BR


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Closing the order line has verified the material status.
entry.content: If the DChain-spec. status in Material Sales View 1 does not permit order placement, an error will occur even when closing the order line, preventing order modification. Can this error message be removed?
